# tplinkeasysmart_qos_mode (Resource)

Manage the switch-wide QoS mode.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "tplinkeasysmart_qos_mode" "switch" {
  mode = "port_based"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `mode` (String) QoS mode. Supported values are `port_based`, `dot1p_based`, and `dscp_dot1p_based`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier for the singleton QoS mode object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = tplinkeasysmart_qos_mode.switch
  id = "qos"
}

resource "tplinkeasysmart_qos_mode" "switch" {
  mode = "port_based"
}
```
